name: Maple Date Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Pillsbury, Cookies, Brownies & Bars, 1991
In a large bowl, beat the brown sugar and butter until light and fluffy. Add the vanilla extract, maple extract, and egg; blend well. Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. Stir in the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix well. Stir in the dates and nuts. Cover with plastic wrap; refrigerate for 30 minutes for easier handling. Preheat oven to 350°F. Shape the dough into 1-inch balls. Place 2 inches apart on ungreased cookie sheets. Bake for 9 to 12 minutes, or until light golden brown.
